creator: mark@grondar.za
text:
> Just start ftp and type  (^\).

The function of ^\ is to send a SIGABRT to the process. SIGABRT will 
cause a core dump. Therefore, this is a feature, not a bug :-)

Look at the man page for stty(1).

M
--
Mark Murray
